Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class RegistrationType

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.RegistrationType
public class RegistrationType extends Object
RegistrationType - The registration of the account (e.g. Individual, Joint, IRA, etc.)

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static RegistrationType of(String value)
      Returns a RegistrationType with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as RegistrationType
